body: Ah, I see. You weren't actually asking, you were just looking for someone to argue with. You're very wrong, but you're part of the problem and huffing on that copium. Good luck!

*Cheating* to intentionally make the game not fun to play for other players is wrong.

If you can troll through skill, time, or money (if p2w) within the mechanics of the game - more power to you. This then is a problem with the devs and not the player.

This isn’t really adding up to me. It sounds like we are missing information. 

Correct me if I’m wrong, but the prize for winning the contest is (1) your entry gets added to the game and (2) you get a code to obtain the item in game. 

Why would Sega ban these players for literally “no reason” just to avoid giving them a code that can’t be worth more than $20?

If the prize was some sort of vacation or a computer or a million dollars, then okay you could say there is a motive to wanting to avoid paying out the prizes. But a code for an in game cosmetic???

This isn’t adding up at all. Perhaps they broke some other rules and they just happen to be the contest winner.
Lost ark is not an MMO. It is a P2W mobile game aimed at incels and pedophiles.
